title: PayPal provider config
description: Configuration shape for a PayPal Checkout + Braintree + Venmo integration. All credentials encrypted at rest.

client_id.description: PayPal REST API client ID. Sent to the customer's client-side SDK. Format: A...(80 chars).

client_secret.description: PayPal REST API client secret. Used server-side for OAuth2 token exchange. Encrypted at rest.

webhook_id.description: PayPal webhook ID (assigned by PayPal at webhook setup). Used to verify inbound webhooks via PayPal's certificate-based verification.

environment.description: PayPal environment. production = api-m.paypal.com; sandbox = api-m.sandbox.paypal.com.

braintree_merchant_id.description: Optional Braintree merchant ID (for tenants using Braintree gateway via PayPal). Required for card acquiring via Braintree.

braintree_public_key.description: Braintree public key. Sent to the customer's client-side Braintree SDK.

braintree_private_key.description: Braintree private key. Used server-side. Encrypted at rest.

venmo_enabled.description: Whether to enable Venmo as a payment method. US-consumer-only. Requires Braintree + additional Venmo agreement.

timeout_seconds.description: PayPal + Braintree tend to be slower than other providers. Default 20s (vs 15s standard).
